title: Yin Yang Symbol: Copy & Paste ☯ Taijitu Balance Character
meta_description: Copy and paste the yin yang symbol (☯) plus the bagua trigrams, yin and yang line digrams, and balance characters from the I Ching. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: The yin yang (☯) taijitu plus the trigrams and yin/yang lines of the I Ching. Click any symbol to copy it instantly.
intro: The yin yang, or taijitu, represents the balance of opposing forces. This library gathers the yin yang symbol alongside the half-shaded circles that echo its duality, the eight bagua trigrams of the I Ching, and the yin and yang line monograms and digrams — all plain Unicode characters you can copy into bios, posts, and designs.

sections.label: Yin Yang
sections.intro: The taijitu and the half-shaded circles that mirror its sense of balance.

sections.label: Trigrams
sections.intro: The eight trigrams that combine the yin and yang lines into elemental signs.

sections.label: Lines
sections.intro: The monogram and digram line forms that build the trigrams.
